title: MessageEnvelope
description: Standard envelope wrapping all inter-service Redis Stream messages. All fields are present after MessageEnvelope.from_redis_fields() deserialization.

source_stream.description: Redis Stream this message originated from

payload.description: Deserialized payload object — see payloads/ for per-type schemas

max_attempts.description: Maximum delivery attempts before routing to stream:dlq

enqueued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of first publish
